overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blonde hair and a green jacket walking through an industrial urban area of Night City. The clip transitions from a narrow back alley with red warehouse buildings and dumpsters to a wider main street lined with palm trees, electrical towers, and futuristic skyscrapers in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with red warehouse and dumpsters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the red warehouse wall, passing green dumpsters and graffiti

entered.detail: large red industrial building with metal paneling and graffiti tags
pair of green industrial waste containers with trash scattered around
wall covered in colorful spray paint graffiti and tags
short concrete posts with yellow tops lining the walkway
large industrial pipe releasing white steam

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow industrial alley beside a massive red warehouse building covered in graffiti. Green dumpsters and concrete bollards line the concrete sidewalk. The area is empty of people, with steam venting from a large pipe on the right and an elevated highway visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with elevated highway and futuristic skyline

events.description: turns left from narrow alley onto open city street revealing skyscrapers and elevated highway

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and proceeding down the main street toward the city center

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: tall palm tree with brown trunk and green fronds
tall futuristic glass and steel tower dominating the skyline
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing above the street
car parked along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a wider city street, transitioning from the enclosed alley to an open urban environment. Palm trees line the sidewalk while futuristic glass skyscrapers rise in the distance. An elevated highway runs parallel to the street, and digital billboards adorn the industrial buildings. A pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with power infrastructure and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing parked vehicles and industrial structures

entered.detail: large metal lattice tower supporting high-voltage power lines
silver metal chain-link fencing running along the sidewalk
green military-style truck parked by the fence
colorful recycling containers with blue, red, and yellow lids
raised concrete island with red curb separating road lanes

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the industrial street, passing a parked military vehicle and colorful recycling bins behind a chain-link fence. A massive electrical transmission tower dominates the center of the view, with overhead power lines crisscrossing the sky. Palm trees continue to line the left side of the street as the elevated highway recedes into the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with pedestrian activity and debris

events.description: pedestrian with red boots walks toward camera from opposite direction

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection while passing a seated person on a bench

notable_agents.action: sitting on concrete bench looking at a device

entered.detail: concrete bench with a person sitting wearing red and blue clothing
large green industrial dumpster with trash bags visible
road intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic
scattered cardboard boxes and trash littering the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection, passing a person sitting on a bench on the right and navigating around cardboard debris scattered on the sidewalk. The electrical tower and palm trees recede into the distance as the open intersection comes into view. Other pedestrians are visible crossing the street ahead, and vehicles move through the intersection in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway into a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins by trailing a character beside a graffiti-covered red warehouse, moving past venting steam and green dumpsters under the shadow of a distant elevated highway. As the character turns left, the enclosed space opens into a broad city street where palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers replace the warehouse walls and digital billboards emerge. The scene then shifts past a parked military vehicle and a massive electrical transmission tower that dominates the skyline before the camera moves toward a populated intersection. Finally, the view expands to reveal pedestrians and distant traffic as the character navigates around sidewalk debris and passes a person resting on a bench.
